hero.title: Al Fahidi, alive again
hero.subtitle: In the alleys of old Bastakiya, beneath the wind towers, AI meets living memory: a living map, sourced stories, and characters from the past who answer you — all in your browser, no app required.

pillars.title: One experience, six journeys
pillars.description: Each journey reveals a different layer of the district's memory — pick a gateway and step in.

map.title: A living map
map.description: Wander the district's real building footprints and open the story of every site with a single tap.

twin.title: Travel through time
twin.description: A 3D digital twin rebuilds the district, with a time slider that carries you from 1950 to today.

characters.title: Characters who speak
characters.description: A pearl diver, a textile merchant, Umm Rashid… voices from the past answering in Arabic and English.

copilot.title: A copilot that plans for you
copilot.description: Tell the AI what you love and how long you have — it writes a personalized walking route through the district's real places.

arx.title: AR in the browser
arx.description: Raise your camera and watch layers of the past float over the present — straight from the browser, nothing to install.

hunt.title: Hidden treasures
hunt.description: A hunt through the alleys: follow the hints, enter the codes, and collect explorer badges.

khor.title: Creek of Stars
khor.description: A meditative 3D walk through Al Fahidi's alleys and wind towers — wander under the stars and gather four ancestral letters.

characters.title: Ask those who lived the story
characters.description: Five characters drawn from the district's history answer you directly — each with their own voice, craft, and tale.

textileMerchant.name: Abdulrahman the Merchant
textileMerchant.role: Textile and spice merchant of the Bur Dubai souq

masterBuilder.name: Usta Hassan
masterBuilder.role: Master builder of wind towers and heritage houses

ummRashid.name: Umm Rashid
ummRashid.role: Emirati grandmother, keeper of hospitality traditions

map.title: A district read from above
map.description: Real building footprints from open data, drawn in a nocturnal heritage style: sand-toned houses, gold wind towers, and dashed alleys guiding your steps.
map.figureLabel: A simplified snapshot of the district map: house footprints, alleys, and points of interest marked with gold dots

cta.title: The district awaits your steps
cta.subtitle: Start with the map, talk with the people of the district, and add your memory to its living archive.
